description_long: This is a single-story ranch-style house with a sprawling, elongated footprint and a low-pitched gable roof. The exterior features light-colored siding, a prominent front porch with columns, and a large attached garage on one end. Multiple symmetrically arranged windows line the front facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The house is set on a rectangular plot with intersecting paved driveways and roads, suggesting a suburban neighborhood context. The roof is dark, contrasting with the lighter walls, and the entryway is accentuated by a covered porch area. The overall design is practical and inviting, typical of mid-20th-century American residential architecture.
description: A sprawling, single-story ranch house with a low gable roof, light siding, a large garage, and a covered front porch, set on a suburban lot with intersecting driveways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, symmetrical windows, and attached garage on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage entrance and driveway leading up to it.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house with fewer windows and the garage on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage's side and the driveway curving around the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Covered front porch with columns, central door, and steps leading up from the driveway
